hero.title: We don't have a "no"
hero.subtitle: Every step in a partnership moves through one of three paths: approve, keep talking, or propose a different version. No door ever locks.

action1.label: Approve
action1.desc: Accept the version as it stands

action3.label: Counter
action3.desc: Propose a new version of the same ask

decisionTime.title: Silence that becomes agreement
decisionTime.body: Every proposal carries its own decision window — the rikma's decision time (between 48 hours and a week, depending on the settings your rikma sets). If no one responds before the window closes, the proposal stands approved. Not because anyone said yes out loud, but because no one objected. That's the rhythm of the weave: time to think, then forward motion.

essence.title: A place to build a livelihood together — by agreement
essence.body: 1💗1 isn't just a nice idea. It's a platform where people run real partnerships (rikmot): a shared project, its missions, its income and its profit-split — all by mutual agreement, with no boss and no majority steamroll. The agreement engine you see here is how every decision in such a partnership is made: money, roles, tasks — each side proposes, and you only move forward on a version both sides hold.

point1.title: Shared partnerships
point1.desc: Run a project, its missions and its money together — in full transparency.

point2.title: Fair profit-split
point2.desc: Everyone's contribution is measured and split by agreement, not by force.

point3.title: No boss, no majority steamroll
point3.desc: Every decision matures by agreement or by silence — at the pace you set.

demo.title: A live negotiation round
demo.subtitle: This is a real proposal on a mission: the launch campaign. Respond the way you would in a real partnership.
demo.windowNote: If you don't respond before the window closes, the proposal is silently approved.
demo.skip: ⏩ Demo: no one responded → agreement by silence
demo.silenceExplainer: Silence = agreement. If the window closes and no one approves, discusses, or counters, the last version on the table is approved on its own. No explicit "yes" is needed — just don't object in time. Try it: leave everything untouched and let the timer run down, or skip to the end of the window.

chat.reply1: Got it, give me a moment to think 🙏
chat.reply2: Still with you on this one — no need to rush.

signed.title: Signed ✍️
signed.body: Both sides now hold the exact same version. That's agreement.
signed.silenceBody: The window closed and no one objected — so the last version on the table became agreement on its own. That's silence becoming agreement.

demo.initialNote: Let's start here: 40 hours on the launch campaign, $120/hour.
demo.partnerCounterNote: Let's meet a little in the middle.

mainCta.kicker: Most people come here for this
mainCta.title: Manage a real partnership by consensus
mainCta.body: Open a rikma, invite partners, and run every decision — money, roles, missions — through the agreement engine. Register and start building together.

links.philTitle: A world run by mutual agreement
links.philBody: 1💗1 is part of something bigger: a world managed by mutual agreement rather than coercion. Discover the global agreement — the convention it all begins with (a separate site).
links.pracBody: Not sure about a partnership? Open a new wish and the concierge will connect you with the right provider.
